steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize a SIMILARITY between the two birds. The notes offer one shared trait (both live on Floreana) and one major difference (weight: 2.5 kg vs. 9 grams). A similarity-focused answer must highlight the shared trait.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'the penguin weighs 2.5 kilograms, while the finch weighs 9 grams': Directly contrasts their weights — emphasizes a difference, not a similarity. ✗
  • Choice B — 'the grey warbler finch can be found on the Galápagos Island of Floreana': Mentions only one bird. A similarity requires both birds to be compared together. ✗
  • Choice C — 'the grey warbler finch and the Galápagos penguin can both be found on Floreana': Names both birds and uses "both" to explicitly highlight the shared characteristic — inhabiting Floreana. ✓
  • Choice D — 'Floreana is home to several bird species, one of which is the Galápagos penguin': Mentions only the penguin and vaguely references other species without naming the finch. No direct comparison. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
